description: A potent, full-spectrum Rick Simpson Oil (RSO) that captures the whole plant's cannabinoids and terpenes in a thick, concentrated extract. Versatile — take it on its own, under the tongue, or add it to food. It blends THC for a classic euphoric lift and CBD to keep things calm and balanced in a 9:1 ratio. Extremely potent, so start with a tiny amount (about a quarter grain of rice) and go slow.
